# Copilot Instructions

This is a 1-hour workshop repo that ships a Slidev deck and a take-home toolkit (prompts, skills, examples) for building a personal portfolio with generative AI.

**Read these first:**
- [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) — conventions, voice rules, commits, build commands, deploy
- [`.github/skills/README.md`](./skills/README.md) — skill index and discovery pattern
- [`README.md`](../README.md) — quick start for presenters and attendees

All conventions live in `AGENTS.md`. If you find guidance here that contradicts `AGENTS.md`, `AGENTS.md` wins.
